changes: Rewrote ClassDetail presentation to match screenshot 18-turma-detalhe.png. View mode: replaced Header with ScreenHeader (back + title + green 'Editar' text button on right). Info group uses rounded-[14px] bg-surface shadow-sm card with InfoRow icon variant (UsersRound/Building2/Calendar/BarChart3/Cake/User). Branch name resolved from useBranches. 'Alunos matriculados' section uses er-sect pattern (font-display 16 extrabold title + green '+ Adicionar' link). Student chips as pill buttons (rounded-full, border border-1, Avatar 32 + first name + X icon) in flex-wrap gap-2 grid. Actions: lg 'Iniciar treino' button + ghost 'Excluir turma' in loss color. Edit mode: kept form fields with side-by-side layout (Dias/Horario, Nivel/Faixa etaria). Sheet confirm delete preserved. All hooks/navigation/mutations unchanged.
